name: code-green
description: Sustainable Computing Audit Tool. Identify and fix energy-inefficient code patterns.

editor/title.when: resourceLangId == java || resourceLangId == python || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == cpp || resourceLangId == csharp || resourceLangId == go || resourceLangId == rust || resourceLangId == swift || resourceLangId == php || resourceLangId == sql || resourceLangId == kotlin || resourceLangId == ruby || resourceLangId == c || resourceLangId == dart || resourceLangId == scala || resourceLangId == shellscript || resourceLangId == perl || resourceLangId == lua || resourceLangId == julia || resourceLangId == haskell || resourceLangId == matlab || resourceLangId == r || resourceLangId == elixir || resourceLangId == solidity || resourceLangId == groovy

viewsWelcome.contents:
Welcome to Code-Green Sustainability Auditor.
[Open Dashboard](command:code-green.openDashboard)
[Run Global Audit](command:code-green.scan)

scripts.build-all: npm run compile && cd ../dashboard && npm install && npm run build
